title: Lazuli GUI
body:
Lazuli GUI currently only made for 1.21.6! Made by @ChisakiArt on Twitter/X (feel free to dm me with any issues or questions!) It should mostly work with all of 1.12.x versions!

-> Some things in the GUI will not work in other versions if you plan on using it in a version other than 1.21

-> If the zip file doesn't show up in Minecraft's resource pack list, unzip the file into your resourcepacks folder :).
